internal/summarizer/ollama.go.one_line: OllamaClient HTTP implementation of Client interface for Ollama API

internal/summarizer/ollama_test.go.one_line: Test suite for OllamaClient with 12 test cases covering chat, health checks, and error handling

internal/summarizer/openrouter.go.one_line: OpenRouterClient HTTP implementation of Client interface for OpenRouter API; defines shared request/response types

internal/summarizer/openrouter_test.go.one_line: Test suite for OpenRouterClient with 6 test cases covering successful completions, API errors, and network failures

internal/summarizer/prompt.go.one_line: Builds prompts for single-message summarization with system/user prompt templates

internal/summarizer/prompt_test.go.one_line: Test suite for BuildSingleMessagePrompt covering validation, channel/source formatting, and source type handling

internal/summarizer/service.go.one_line: Service orchestrates message summarization: fetches unsummarized messages, calls LLM, stores results

internal/summarizer/service_test.go.one_line: Test suite for Service with 13 test cases covering single-message and queue summarization

internal/summarizer/summarizer.go.one_line: Type definitions and interfaces: MessageSummarizeResult, SummarizeQueueResult, Client interface, ChatRequest, ChatMessage
